	__class__r
GObjectMeta.__init__c
GObjectMeta.mroc
zFMeta class property which shows up on any class using this meta-class.
gi.overrides)
docr
GObjectMeta.__doc__)
__classcell__r
q~qF
Compute the class precedence list (mro) according to C3, with GObject
    interface considerations.
    We override Python's MRO calculation to account for the fact that
    GObject classes are not affected by the diamond problem:
    http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Diamond_problem
    Based on http://www.python.org/download/releases/2.3/mro/
    r
	candidater
<listcomp>(
mro.<locals>.<listcomp>Nz8Cannot create a consistent method resolution order (MRO))

Z	docstringr
